meta.display_name: Conflicting Directives on Jason Mitchell's Wellbeing Check-In

task: Catherine Moore's email asks you to schedule a 30-minute wellbeing check-in for Jason Mitchell this week. Before proceeding, check the #finance-hr-holds channel — there may be a conflicting directive. If there's a conflict, you'll need to flag it to both Catherine Moore and Nancy Cooper via email. In your emails, include the specific reason for the hold — message Nancy Cooper on Chat to get the details on what's driving the restructure review and when she expects a resolution. Also message Thomas Reed on Chat to confirm whether he's aware of any additional context about Jason's situation that HR should include in the flag emails. Post a summary in the #finance-hr-holds channel as well. Do not schedule anything until the hold is resolved.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I placed the hold on Jason Mitchell's scheduling because we are evaluating whether Jason's reporting line will move from Thomas Reed to Amanda Wright as part of a finance org restructure. I expect to have a final decision by end of next week. The hold should remain in place until then. Please include in any communications that the hold is driven by a pending reporting-line change under the Q1 finance restructure review.

I want HR to know that Jason has mentioned to me he's been feeling overwhelmed with the new people-management duties, and I think the wellbeing check-in is important and should happen as soon as the hold is lifted. Please include in the flag emails that Jason's manager considers this check-in time-sensitive once the hold clears.

seed_emails.subject: Wellbeing Check-in for Jason Mitchell
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

Could you please schedule a 30-minute wellbeing check-in between Jason Mitchell and his manager Thomas Reed this week? Jason recently transitioned into his first people-management responsibilities and I want to make sure he's adjusting well. Please keep me in the loop on the outcome.

Thanks,
Catherine Moore
seed_emails.body_html:
Hi HR,

Could you please schedule a 30-minute wellbeing check-in between Jason Mitchell and his manager Thomas Reed this week? Jason recently transitioned into his first people-management responsibilities and I want to make sure he's adjusting well. Please keep me in the loop on the outcome.

Thanks,
Catherine Moore

messages.text: Heads up — please hold off on scheduling any new meetings or check-ins for Jason Mitchell this week. We have a pending org restructure review that may reassign his reporting line. Do not proceed with any wellbeing or 1:1 scheduling until I confirm the hold is lifted.
Acknowledged, Nancy. I'll wait for your go-ahead before scheduling anything with Jason.
